forbidden_live_substitutions: OpenAI API must not satisfy codex_intake, chatgpt_pro_first_plan, or chatgpt_pro_synthesis in this workflow.
Gemini API must not satisfy gemini_deep_think in this workflow.
Anthropic API must not satisfy claude_code_opus in this workflow.
Oracle browser output without redacted evidence must not satisfy critical browser slots.
Do not satisfy DeepSeek search-enabled review with DeepSeek web UI, unofficial proxies, or undocumented API search flags; use official DeepSeek API plus APR search tool calls.

chatgpt_pro_first_plan.selection_rule: Select ChatGPT Pro and the highest visible thinking-effort option. Do not hard-code a browser label; record observed label/rank evidence before prompt submission.

chatgpt_pro_synthesis.selection_rule: Select ChatGPT Pro and the highest visible thinking-effort option. Do not hard-code a browser label; record observed label/rank evidence before prompt submission.

claude_code_opus.selection_rule: Use Claude Code subscription CLI with --model claude-opus-4-7 and --effort max, or CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL=max. Include ultrathink as additional one-off request language only.

codex_intake.source: OpenAI Codex config docs list model_reasoning_effort and plan_mode_reasoning_effort values including xhigh.

codex_thinking_fast_draft.source: Fast mode may use Codex CLI as exploratory context only; highest effort is still required.

deepseek_v4_pro_reasoning_search.selection_rule: Use official DeepSeek API with thinking enabled and reasoning_effort=max. If tool calls occur, preserve reasoning_content transiently only as needed for DeepSeek's required tool-call replay, then discard raw content and persist at most a hash.

gemini_deep_think.selection_rule: Select Deep Think and, if exposed, the high thinking level in the Gemini web UI; evidence must record both browser mode and effort/rank observations.

xai_grok_reasoning.selection_rule: For Grok 4.3, official xAI docs list none/low/medium/high; high is the maximum single-model reasoning depth. Do not use xhigh for Grok 4.3. If using grok-4.20-multi-agent, xhigh controls agent count rather than single-model reasoning depth and must be a separately named route.

runtime_invariants: balanced and audit require chatgpt_pro_first_plan and chatgpt_pro_synthesis through Oracle browser automation.
balanced and audit require gemini_deep_think unless a recorded waiver explicitly downgrades the run before live fanout.
fast may use codex_thinking_fast_draft but remains exploratory until promoted or waived.
all critical browser slots require same-session verified-before-submit evidence.
DeepSeek official API is allowed only for deepseek_v4_pro_reasoning_search; it must use deepseek-v4-pro with thinking enabled, reasoning_effort=max, and APR-provided search tooling.
All live model calls must request the provider-specific highest documented reasoning effort from fixtures/model-reasoning-policy.json.
Unknown, default, missing, or lower reasoning effort makes balanced/audit provider results synthesis-ineligible unless a pre-call waiver is recorded.
DeepSeek reasoning_content may be replayed transiently inside the adapter for tool-call continuity but must not be persisted except as a redacted hash.
Browser effort labels are evidence observations, not stable contract literals.
Route readiness is stage-scoped; preflight readiness does not imply synthesis eligibility.
Provider docs snapshots must be refreshed before audit runs.
